summary: Iteration 112: UI Consolidation Testing Complete. Verified Training tab shows only TrainingMatrix (no legacy 'Training Records' card). TrainingDetailDrawer opens with Details/Evidence/History tabs when clicking training title. Recruitment tab shows Reference Integrity, Employment History & Gap Analysis, Name Mismatch checks - NO Proof of Address section. All tabs (Overview, Compliance File, Policies, Training, Audit Log, Recruitment, Recurring) load without errors.

issues:
Console warning: 'In HTML,
cannot be a descendant of

' - Badge component inside SheetDescription causing hydration warning. Non-blocking but should be fixed for clean console.
Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in TableBody from TrainingMatrix. Non-blocking but should add unique keys to table rows.

critical_code_review_comments: UI Consolidation verified: ~993 lines of dead/duplicate code removed from EmployeeProfilePage.js
Training tab now shows only TrainingMatrix component - no legacy 'Training Records' card
Recruitment tab shows Reference Integrity, Employment History & Gap Analysis - Proof of Address section removed
Minor: TrainingDetailDrawer has HTML nesting warning (div inside p) - Badge inside SheetDescription
Minor: TrainingMatrix table rows missing unique keys
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Consolidation complete. EmployeeProfilePage.js reduced from 9676 to 8683 lines. Training tab = TrainingMatrix only. Recruitment tab = Reference Integrity + Employment History + Name Mismatch (no Proof of Address section). All tabs working correctly.

training_tab_shows_only_training_matrix.details: Training tab displays TrainingMatrix component with 6 training items, 100% completion progress. No legacy 'Training Records' card found.

training_title_click_opens_drawer.details: Clicking 'Safeguarding' training title opens TrainingDetailDrawer with Details/Evidence/History tabs

recruitment_tab_shows_reference_integrit.details: Reference Integrity section shows Reference 1 and Reference 2 with 'Verify Reference' buttons

recruitment_tab_shows_employment_history.details: Employment History & Gap Analysis section shows gap detection (76 days gap) and CV mismatch warning

recruitment_tab_no_proof_of_address_sect.details: No Proof of Address section header found in Recruitment tab. Note: Backend status message mentions POA in blockers list, but no dedicated UI section exists.

compliance_file_tab_shows_requirements.details: Compliance File tab shows 25 requirement rows with file state, view/download/verify actions

profile_page_loads_without_errors.details: Profile page loads successfully for employee OCS-0001

overview_tab_shows_summary.details: Overview tab shows Personal Details and Care Status sections

policies_tab_shows_assigned_policies.details: Policies tab shows 'Assigned Policies' section (0 of 0 acknowledged)

recurring_tab_shows_recurring_items.details: Recurring tab shows Overdue (0), Due Now (2), Upcoming (1), Total Active (3) with items like Competency Assessment, Monthly Supervision, Spot Check
